scripts.dev: concurrently --names api,web --prefix-colors blue,green "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.dev:api: bash -c 'cd apps/api || exit 1; case ${PREFIX+x} in x) export LD_LIBRARY_PATH=${PREFIX}/lib:${LD_LIBRARY_PATH:-}; if [ ! -e ${PREFIX}/lib/libgcc_s.so.1 ]; then if command -v pkg >/dev/null 2>&1; then pkg install -y libgcc || exit 1; else echo [api] Missing Termux libgcc runtime. Run: pkg install libgcc >&2; exit 1; fi; fi;; esac; fuser -k 8000/tcp 2>/dev/null || true; while true; do if [ -x .venv/bin/uvicorn ]; then .venv/bin/uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --reload; elif command -v uvicorn >/dev/null 2>&1; then uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --reload; else python3 -m uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --reload; fi; sleep 2; done'
